aus_extension.name: Position of case affixes
aus_extension.gloss: Where case marking sits: suffix, prefix, clitic, tone, stem change.

aus_extension.name: Bound-pronoun / pronominal-subject host
aus_extension.gloss: How pronominal subjects are expressed: obligatory free pronoun, subject affix on the verb, clitic on a variable host (e.g. second position / auxiliary), etc.

aus_extension.name: Second-position pronominal clitic cluster
aus_extension.gloss: Whether bound pronouns form a clitic cluster on a variable (typically second-position/auxiliary) host rather than being fixed to the verb.

aus_extension.name: Position of tense-aspect affixes
aus_extension.gloss: Where TAM inflection sits on the verb: prefix, suffix, tone, mixed, none.

aus_extension.name: Standard negation strategy
aus_extension.gloss: How declarative clauses are negated: affix, particle, negative auxiliary, etc.
